dock.active: (call get_material_wood(Feature('Tischmaterial')) or call table_kelco()) and Number(PartAttr(part,'laenge')) ge 125;
(call get_material_wood(Feature('Tischmaterial')) or call table_kelco()) and Number(PartAttr(part,'laenge')) ge 125;

component.comment: like zarge_i_150 but double the docks

dock.active: my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '2');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';
my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '2');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';
my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '1');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';
my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '1');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';

component.comment: 2013 aufgrund selectioncheck amount auf 1 und active expression angepasst

dock.active: my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '2');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';
my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '2');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';
my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '1');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';

my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '2');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';

my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '1');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';

my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '2');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';

my dock = Dock(part, 'tisch_2_buegel', '1');not Bool(DockGetConnectedDock(dock)) and Feature('f_tischmodell') ne 'access';
